text:
SSI_STATE_SPLMT_CD_12 

LABEL: Supplemental Security Income (SSI) State Supplement Code ― January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: A monthly code indicating the beneficiary's Supplemental Security Income (SSI) State Supplemental 
status. There are separate variables for each of the 12 months during the year. 

SHORT NAME: SSI_STATE_SPLMT_CD_01 
SSI_STATE_SPLMT_CD_02 
SSI_STATE_SPLMT_CD_03 
SSI_STATE_SPLMT_CD_04 
SSI_STATE_SPLMT_CD_05 
SSI_STATE_SPLMT_CD_06 
 SSI_STATE_SPLMT_CD_07
